title: Touch 2: Intro Deck Generation
description: Walk through the complete Touch 2 intro deck workflow: strategy resolution, slide selection, and the full 3-gate HITL review with a skeleton refine demo.

steps.narration: Navigate to the Touch 2 Intro Deck page for the Meridian Dynamics deal. This is where you create a company introduction presentation tailored to your prospect.
Before generation starts, the page is grounded in the Meridian Dynamics deal context and ready for the AI to assemble an intro deck tailored to this prospect.

callout.text: Deck strategy is resolved from deal context

steps.narration: After clicking generate, the workflow moves into an in-progress state while the AI assembles the intro deck for Meridian Dynamics.
The skeleton gate shows the proposed deck structure. Review the slide order and purpose of each slide before the AI fills in the content.
Take a closer look at the proposed slide order. Each slide has a clear purpose tied to the sales narrative. You can request changes if the structure needs adjustment.
When you request a refinement at the skeleton gate, the page returns to the same in-progress state while the AI revises the outline before any slide content is drafted.
The AI has refined the deck structure based on your feedback. Notice the updated slide titles, an additional Google Workspace slide, and a clearer narrative flow.
After approving the refined skeleton, the workflow enters the draft gate. Review the ordered slide list and the draft notes the AI generated for each section.
Here you can see the draft notes for each slide. The AI has populated metrics and messaging that align with Meridian Dynamics' specific challenges.
At this draft gate, the ordered slide list stays available for review before the final polished deck is generated.
After approving the draft content, the final gate shows a live preview of the generated intro deck along with a direct link to Google Slides.
The final preview shows the polished presentation styling, including branded layouts, metrics, and section formatting for the Meridian Dynamics deck.
Your intro deck is complete and saved to Drive. Use the final artifact link to open it directly before your next meeting with Meridian Dynamics.
